matches.rationale: The Write rule uses the same evidence and targets creation of UI primitives under packages/ui, requiring consultation of packages/ui/index.tsx.
The Edit rule detects literal hexadecimal colors in styling-related files and cites the prohibition on hardcoded colors.
The Edit rule targets Studio keyboard-action implementations and explicitly requires the shared shortcut registry for repeated Studio UI actions.
The Write rule targets Studio index files and cites the instruction to avoid barrel re-export files.
